message:
feat(tui): frame-based rendering pipeline + ftui API compat fixes

Adds production render_frame() entrypoint with full widget rendering
(header, mounts, ballast, scanner, events, notifications, overlay panels).
Updates ftui imports for API changes: Line::from_spans(), Text::from_lines(),
borders module split. Includes walker iteration cap and CLI enhancements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ required-features = ["cli"]

@@ -39,7 +39,7 @@ rusqlite = { version = "0.33", features = ["bundled", "functions"], optional = t

 thiserror = "2.0"

-ftui-core = { path = "/dp/frankentui/crates/ftui-core", optional = true }
